headlines.title: SpaceX Wants to Fuel Its Mars Ambitions With Its Own Gas Pipeline
headlines.summary: SpaceX has spent years trying to reinvent rockets. Now it's coming after midstream. The aerospace giant plans to begin construction next month on an eight-mile natural gas pipeline dubbed "Starpipe" that will feed its Starbase launch facility in South Texas, according to filings

headlines.title: Kazakhstan Lands $12 Billion in EU Deals to Expand Energy and Trade Ties
headlines.summary: Kazakh President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev’s visit to the EU’s headquarters in Brussels has yielded agreements and MoUs potentially valued at over 12 billion dollars. headlines.title: Russia Turns Asia’s Oil Shock Into an Indonesian Opening
headlines.summary: Russia has emerged as one of the clearest commercial beneficiaries of the US-Israel war with Iran.
